programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 211
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Ya Dek Ya, Dia Pilih Pemeran Utama
programme.desc: Determined to avoid an arranged marriage with a wealthy man named Ray, Vina forces her best friend, Dila-a local durian ice vendor-to take her place. Little does Dila know, Ray had the exact same idea and sent his best friend, Kenan, to impersonate him. When the two fake identities meet, they introduce themselves with entirely different aliases, leading to a hilarious web of lies and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 13
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 159
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BABANG JEMPUTNYA SATU CINTANYA BANYAK
programme.desc: Marni (Enzy Storia) is furious when her charge switches to a new school shuttle driven by Bagyo (Dimaz Andrean). Terrified of losing her only source of income as a babysitter, Marni vows to make Bagyo pay for stealing her client. However, as she plans her revenge, she discovers that Bagyo is definitely not your average school bus driver

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 211
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Aku Gak Bisa Yura, Menghindari Ledakan Cintamu
programme.desc: After receiving life-changing help from a kind stranger, Yasmin (Ina Marika) feels deeply indebted. To repay the favor, she hires the mysterious man to be her personal driver and bodyguard, completely unaware of the adventures that await them.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 13

programme.title: AKSOBHNYA
programme.desc: A desperate archeologist becomes obsessed with selling a priceless ancient statue on the black market to fund her life-saving treatment for uterine cancer.

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dek Jamu Kuat Cintaku Syenggol Dong
programme.desc: Wini (Larasati Nugroho) makes a living selling traditional herbal medicine (jamu) and pecel in her village. Her life takes a turn when a foreign tourist named Jason (Andrew Andika) falls in love with the village’s scenery and decides to stay at her house, learning about local life through Wini.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 13

programme.title: JURUS TUKANG ES KELAPA MEMETIK CINTA
programme.desc: Running away from an unwanted wedding, Wina (Larasati Nugroho) crosses paths with Jali (Randy Pangalila), a humble coconut ice vendor. The plot thickens when she realizes Jali is the son of Nyak Rodiah, the owner of the Kumbang Tanduk martial arts school-the bitter, long-time rival of her own family's school, Macan Merah

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 212
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Pinjol Hatiku, Nanti Semakin Berbunga
programme.desc: Drowning in family debt, Mita (Jennifer Eve) is pressured by her mother to find a wealthy husband to save them from financial ruin. She thinks she has hit the jackpot when she hooks the perfect rich bachelor, Dirga (Lucky Perdana). However, her dream turns into a shock when she discovers Dirga is actually the son of the very debt collector hunting her parents down.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 160

programme.title: CINTA GUDEG MERCON SENG ADA LAWAN
programme.desc: Jaya chooses a humble life selling spicy gudeg mercon (traditional jackfruit stew) over inheriting his father's multi-million company. Meanwhile, a newly bankrupt Neysa (Maudy Effrosina) is struggling to run her late mother’s catering business. When Neysa tries Jaya’s rustic dish for the first time, her stomach rebels, causing her to vomit. The crowd mistakenly panics, assuming Jaya’s gudeg is poisonous, sparking a fierce rivalry between the two food vendors

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 212
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jangan Ya Dek Ya, Dia Pilih Pemeran Utama
programme.desc: Determined to avoid an arranged marriage with a wealthy man named Ray, Vina forces her best friend, Dila-a local durian ice vendor-to take her place. Little does Dila know, Ray had the exact same idea and sent his best friend, Kenan, to impersonate him. When the two fake identities meet, they introduce themselves with entirely different aliases, leading to a hilarious web of lies and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 14

programme.title: KAMU GILA BUT I LOVE YOU
programme.desc: Popi (Larasati Nugroho) goes undercover, posing as her older sister Ninuk at a corporate office to pay for Ninuk's rising hospital bills. There, she meets Rangga (Ridho Ilahi), a corporate man 15 years her senior. The real chaos begins because Rangga has no idea that the seemingly incompetent employee he’s falling for is actually a 17-year-old minor in disguise

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 213
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lirikan Kamu Lain Bikin Pengen Log In
programme.desc: Dinda (Shanice Margaretha) lands a job interview through a friend's recommendation, only to realize her new boss is Wildan (Aditya Zoni)-the very man who had just knocked her down in a reckless roadside accident. Despite their rocky start, working closely together begins to blur the lines between professionalism and romance.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 15
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 40
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 9
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 18
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 12
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 7
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 10
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 2
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 8
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 5
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 2
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Elak - Elak.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 3

programme.title: Bibik Aku Nak Kahwin
programme.desc: Milah yang terlalu berharap untuk berkahwin, akhirnya menemui jodoh secara tiba-tiba. Lakonan Didie Alias, Hairul Azreen dan Nabila AF.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends Live - EP 6
programme.desc: Kumpulan pelawak popular, Bocey kembali beraksi dengan sketsa komedi yang menarik. Nantikan siapakah tetamu istimewa yang akan beraksi bersama mereka.

programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: RI-OH RIMBA - EP 1
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 6
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong ? - EP 3

programme.title: Tejas
programme.desc: Indian Air Force officer Tejas embarks on a risky mission to rescue an Indian spy from Pakistan. Along the way, she battles both formidable adversaries and haunting personal demons from her past. Release Year: 2023 Director: Sarvesh Mewara

programme.title: Laila Majnu
programme.desc: Two lovers from Kashmir are separated by family opposition and circumstances, leading Qais into obsession as their intense love story unfolds through pain, longing, and tragic destiny. Release Year: 1976 Director: Harnam Singh Rawail

programme.title: Shrin Farhad Ki Toh Nikal Padi
programme.desc: Farhad, a 45-year-old bachelor, navigates love and family drama when he meets Shirin, only to face backlash from his overbearing mother. Can their romance survive the chaos?

programme.title: Ishq Forever
programme.desc: Rhea, the prime minister's daughter, escapes her restricted life and falls in love with Aryan abroad, choosing freedom and romance over power. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sameer Sippy

programme.title: Bhoot Returns
programme.desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a grand bungalow with their kids, but terrifying events reveal a dark presence, pushing the family to fight to survive. Release Year: 2012 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Rangrezz
programme.desc: Three friends reunite to help a lover elope, but when the couple separates, they return to teach them a lesson about loyalty and friendship. Release Year: 2013 Director: Priyadarshan

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: While searching for his missing brother, Akshay joins gangster Maya's gang, proving his strength and loyalty by fighting her ruthless rival in a high-stakes wrestling match to survive. Release Year: 1996 Director: Umesh Mehra

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds. Release Year: 2022 Director: Vishal Furia

programme.title: Rashmi Rocket
programme.desc: Rashmi, a small-town girl, overcomes societal barriers and goes on to become a national-level athlete. However, her career hits rock bottom when she is forced to undergo a gender test. Release Year: 2021 Director: Akarsh Khurana Awards: 2022 Winner Special Award- Scene Stealing Performance of the Year- Taapsee Pannu

programme.desc: During a prestigious tennis tournament, the lifeless body of player Manon Picard is found on the court. Investigators Romain Fabiot and Camille Lauristan are assisted by Vincent Beti, a former player with a troubled past.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 18 AUG
programme.desc: Review bursts into life with Matchweek 1 of the 2025/26 Premier League with a blockbuster Sunday showdown as Manchester United host Arsenal at Old Trafford. Chelsea face an immediate test against Crystal Palace, Wolves welcome Manchester City to Molinuex, and Liverpool kick-off their title defence against Bournemouth.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 25
programme.desc: Ahead of the first North London derby of the season, we sit down with the man who made one of most controversial transfers in World football; Sol Campbell. He opens up about his decision to leave Tottenham for their fiercest rivals, Arsenal, the intense pressure of returning to White Hart Lane that first season, and how he's dealt with the fallout ever since. A fascinating insight into the 'move that shook North London'.

programme.title: FS MMA Michal Michalski vs. Dominik Humburger
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 86 in Wroclaw, Poland when two spectacular middleweights meet as Michael Michalski, who has seven wins by stoppage on his record, faces the undefeated Dominik Humburger, who has sent his opponents to the canvas six times.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Shane Mosley
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-unbeaten Saul "Canelo" Alvarez in what might yet be his toughest challenge in his career, as he defends the WBC light middleweight championship against "Sugar" Shane Mosley. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Asanoyama, Takakeisho, Kiribayama and Mitakeumi.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Marcos Maidana vs. Erik Morales
programme.desc: This episode features Marcos Maidana attempting to win the WBA interim super lightweight title against Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: FS MMA Michal Michalski vs. Dominik Humburger
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 86 in Wroclaw, Poland when two spectacular middleweights meet as Michael Michalski, who has seven wins by stoppage on his record, faces the undefeated Dominik Humburger, who has sent his opponents to the canvas six times.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Shane Mosley
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-unbeaten Saul "Canelo" Alvarez in what might yet be his toughest challenge in his career, as he defends the WBC light middleweight championship against "Sugar" Shane Mosley. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Asanoyama, Takakeisho, Kiribayama and Mitakeumi.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Marcos Maidana vs. Erik Morales
programme.desc: This episode features Marcos Maidana attempting to win the WBA interim super lightweight title against Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: FS MMA Michal Michalski vs. Dominik Humburger
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 86 in Wroclaw, Poland when two spectacular middleweights meet as Michael Michalski, who has seven wins by stoppage on his record, faces the undefeated Dominik Humburger, who has sent his opponents to the canvas six times.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: WCCB Sara Bailey vs. Evelin Bermudez
programme.desc: LIVE September 21st from the Hard Rock Casino in Ottawa, Canada, undefeated WBA Light Flyweight World Champion Sara Bailey of Ontario and IBF/WBO Light Flyweight World Champion Evelin Bermudez of Argentina meet to unify the titles. Bailey claimed her title in just her fourth professional fight defeating Guadalupe Bautista, and Bermudez became a two-time champion when beating Tania Enriquez before two successful defenses.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we look at different weapons used throughout the martial arts and the technology used to make them stronger and more efficient.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Canelo Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: This episode features Canelo Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, facing Ryan Rhodes, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Floyd Mayweather, Jr. vs. Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Floyd Mayweather, Jr. challenging Miguel Cotto for his WBA super welterweight title in a bout which drew 1.5 million buys. Also on the card, action from former WBC Welterweight champ Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Prix from Dusseldorf and head to Peru to witness different forms of Judo.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features an interview with former UFC light heavyweight champion and true MMA legend, "The Phenom" Vitor Belfort. Bantamweight champion Dominick Cruz helps out with children's charities and feeding the hungry. Cage fighting veteran Frank Mir shows off his classic car and high tech hot rod collection and MMA legend Chuck Liddell unveils his life size wax statue.

programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a dramatic middleweight title fight between Yannick Bahati and Dricus du Plessis that ends in a tapout by guillotine, while Ricky Misholas takes on Nico Yamdjie in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Paul Williams vs. Verno Phillips
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Junior Middleweights Paul "The Punisher" Williams (35-1, 26 KOs) and Verno Phillips (42-10, 21 KOs) as they battle for the vacant WBO Interim Belt at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California, USA, on November 29, 2008.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Akifumi Shimoda vs. Rico Ramos
programme.desc: This episode features a title bout between and Rico Ramos and WBA super bantamweight champion Akifumi Shimoda that ends with a highlight-reel KO, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 117
programme.desc: A musical staircase magically appears in Teletubbyland. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po take turns making music as they go up and down the stairs.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 11
programme.desc: We see lots of different types of unicorn - a white unicorn, a rainbow unicorn, a sparkly unicorn, a fluffy unicorn and a yummy unicorn. Dee has a ride on a flying unicorn and has a dance with a friend and a disco unicorn! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 15
programme.desc: Everyone in OKIDO is feeling very tired. Messy tries to help by adding extra superbeans to Farmer Fuddle's new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy! How can Messy help them burn it off so OKIDO City can go back to normal?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo join the big cross-town race with plans to win. But how can they stay ahead when they have to keep stopping and swopping to help other racers in trouble?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: The Go Jetters set out to stop Glitch playing dominoes with the ancient stones of Stonehenge.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 25
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Andy destroys a salty rock that Mr Hammond had collected for the mountain goat enclosure, Andy must head off to the Rocky Mountains of North America in search of a new one. Along the way he meets a pika and some bighorn sheep before climbing a mountain to find the goats. Will Andy find a new rock? And will he get back to Safari World in time?

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick. They need to head to a nearby island but they are too poorly to sail the ship. Can Duggee and the squirrels help?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 48
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge! There is so much to see, from the Carrot museum, to the Big Fruit tree. But Gerbie would rather see what real life is like and how the squirrels spend their day so the squirrels take Gerbie on a tour of the clubhouse, while Duggee tries to keep up!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 47
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday! The squirrels decide they should have a party, but they will have to keep it a secret as it's a very BIG surprise. Now what do you need for a party? Balloons, Decorations, Invitations! Will the squirrels be able to plan the party of the year whilst keeping it a secret...

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Glitch's hopes of winning a solar-powered race across the Australian outback are foiled when he crashes the Glitchster in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: After hearing about how the Monument to the Equator in Ciudad Mitad del Mundo is in the wrong location, Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters and move the monument onto the equator.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Thomas finds out that the Earl's Technology Fair will bring new inventions to Sodor, he fears the Sodor engines will be replaced by new technology.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Stanley must deliver some parcels on the train but ends up delivering the wrong ones. After correcting his mistake, he has to muster the townsfolk to help stop his runaway train.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Wobbly teeth, hiccups, hay fever, and sneezy problems, the talking animals discuss all the things that make them unwell.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are making Great Gran Gran's St Lucian Callaloo soup, but can't buy the last few vegetables needed. Gran Gran has a Gran Gran Plan to harvest her own vegetables from the allotment.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of 'fluffing' in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Cadets all over the island tune in to watch Foz present the first Go Jet Academy weather report, which uses high-tech balloons and sea-buoys to predict the weather. But panic ensues when Glitch decides to broadcast his own, fake weather report - leaving the cadets and Grimbots stranded. Can the Go Jetters un-glitch their weather equipment and save the cadets?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Apple. Singing in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 22
programme.desc: All the fruit and veggies in the supermarket are enjoying Fruit and Veggie Friends Day, but Evil Pea is determined to ruin it. After Supertato inadvertently stops her from taking the friendship cards and launching attacks with her pea shooter and freezy hose, Evil Pea tries to cover the party in ice cream. But when her plan goes wrong, she's rolled away on the ice cream tub, and Supertato saves her.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 23
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and the Grape Kids are enjoying flying kites until Evil Pea arrives in her balloon and cuts them down so she can rule the supermarket skies! Supertato and Carrot must climb a display of chopsticks to retrieve the kites from the top. Evil Pea threatens to cut them down again, so Supertato and Carrot turn their kites into hang-gliders and embark on an epic aerial chase with Evil Pea, leading to her bursting her balloon on a chopsticks display sign.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 118
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po want to go outside but it's raining. Some wellies and umbrellas magically appear and the Teletubbies go outside for splashy, rainy fun.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: Dee and a friend cuddle a soft raspberry and we meet the one and only Princess Raspberry! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: Mayor Oki and Geoffrey get competitive. They each want their fizzy water to be OKIDO's one and only favourite. Messy tries to help them both get to the top spot, but things get very fizzy very quickly!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: When a lost bird takes a liking to Bo, it is up to Mojo to fly it home. But it's a stormy trip, and Bo will need to do some flying of his own!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Glitch makes a sandcastle around an oasis in the Sahara. Can the Go Jetters save the day?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the temperature of the African penguin enclosure accidentally gets lowered, Jen must correct it immediately, but she can't remember what the correct temperature was. To the rescue comes Andy, who jets off in his safari-mobile, heading to Africa to discover the correct temperature that makes African penguin chicks hatch from their eggs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick. They need to head to a nearby island but they are too poorly to sail the ship. Can Duggee and the squirrels help?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 48
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge! There is so much to see, from the Carrot museum, to the Big Fruit tree. But Gerbie would rather see what real life is like and how the squirrels spend their day so the squirrels take Gerbie on a tour of the clubhouse, while Duggee tries to keep up!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic Ocean in a vintage plane.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Glitch's hopes of winning a solar-powered race across the Australian outback are foiled when he crashes the Glitchster in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 22
programme.desc: When a pair of crooks steal plans for a great new invention, there is a high-speed chase to try and get them back and allow them to prove their worth.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.desc: The Go Jetters are paddling down Malaysia's Selangor River in canoes to look at the region's fireflies. Although they manage to stop him, the approaching dark and some thick mud leave them in a tricky situation. Can the team work out how to light their way and find their friends?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Glitch's hopes of winning a solar-powered race across the Australian outback are foiled when he crashes the Glitchster in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 22
programme.desc: When a pair of crooks steal plans for a great new invention, there is a high-speed chase to try and get them back and allow them to prove their worth.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Unicorns, dragons, mermen, and the tooth fairy! The little animals share their favourite magical creatures.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: JoJo has a check-up at the dentist and is hoping to earn a special sticker for looking after her teeth and keeping them clean and fresh!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are paddling down Malaysia's Selangor River in canoes to look at the region's fireflies. But after a bend in the river, they encounter Glitch attempting to chop down one of the protected mangrove trees, hoping to impress Tala with the rare plant. Although they manage to stop him, the approaching dark and some thick mud leave them in a tricky situation. Can the team work out how to light their way and find their friends?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, "Just Can't Help Being Sweet!"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Apple. Singing in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 23
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and the Grape Kids are enjoying flying kites until Evil Pea arrives in her balloon and cuts them down so she can rule the supermarket skies! Supertato and Carrot must climb a display of chopsticks to retrieve the kites from the top. Evil Pea threatens to cut them down again, so Supertato and Carrot turn their kites into hang-gliders and embark on an epic aerial chase with Evil Pea, leading to her bursting her balloon on a chopsticks display sign.

programme.title: Supertato S02 - EP 24
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 118
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po want to go outside but it's raining. Some wellies and umbrellas magically appear and the Teletubbies go outside for splashy, rainy fun.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: Dee and a friend cuddle a soft raspberry and we meet the one and only Princess Raspberry! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 16
programme.desc: Mayor Oki and Geoffrey get competitive. They each want their fizzy water to be OKIDO's one and only favourite. Messy tries to help them both get to the top spot, but things get very fizzy very quickly!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: When a lost bird takes a liking to Bo, it is up to Mojo to fly it home. But it's a stormy trip, and Bo will need to do some flying of his own!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone they think is Enid, only much too big... Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid! Of course, the Squirrels want their faces painted too, so Duggee sets to it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Glitch makes a sandcastle around an oasis in the Sahara. Can the Go Jetters save the day?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 26
programme.desc: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the temperature of the African penguin enclosure accidentally gets lowered, Jen must correct it immediately, but she can't remember what the correct temperature was. To the rescue comes Andy, who jets off in his safari-mobile, heading to Africa to discover the correct temperature that makes African penguin chicks hatch from their eggs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 50
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error. The squirrels go on an adventure to work out what the key opens and what could be inside. But what is Trial and Error? Duggee explains that sometimes things work and sometimes they don't.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 49
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick. They need to head to a nearby island but they are too poorly to sail the ship. Can Duggee and the squirrels help?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 48
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge! There is so much to see, from the Carrot museum, to the Big Fruit tree. But Gerbie would rather see what real life is like and how the squirrels spend their day so the squirrels take Gerbie on a tour of the clubhouse, while Duggee tries to keep up!

The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 13

The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 14

Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across the Kalahari in southern Africa. Covering half a million square miles of desert and scrubland, it's one of the last great unspoiled African wildernesses, sitting on top of a vast basin of sand that in places reaches up to a mile in depth. Simon tracks wildebeest with a group of one of the region's indigenous inhabitants, the San, who are renowned for their hunting and tracking techniques.

programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hokkaido is Japan's northernmost - and wildest - island, a place totally unlike the rest of the country. It takes tough animals and tough people with real ingenuity to survive, and even thrive, in this ever-changing place.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 24
programme.desc: Rachael and her sister Maria team up to show how to make a rustic meal of roasted pork and chicken sausages, tossed with vegetables and grapes.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 4
programme.desc: Food carving elevates delicacies to visual delights. From dragon made of carrot, taro and shrimps, to phoenix made of bottarga, Taiwanese Chef Liao Ching-chih morphs ingredients into flavorful spectacles.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 43
programme.desc: Chef Guillaume Brahimi sets a pressure test fit for a king, pushes the contestants to their limits. They need to replicate Guillaume's dish as closely as possible in both looks and taste.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 11
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck. Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face, but is fearful of surgery because of previous problems.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 3
programme.desc: In traditional Taiwanese cuisine, pig liver was regarded as a luxurious ingredient used in nutrition-boosting dishes. Legendary Chef A-fa showcases the gastronomic potential of pig liver.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: Betrayed By Love
programme.desc: Riley March's near-perfect life comes to a sudden halt when a car accident takes her life, leaving behind a family without a mother. As the investigation commences, the case takes a strange turn.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something - EP 6
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits as Theresa invites viewers to peek behind the curtain of her gift, being on tour, as well as surprising clients and never-before-seen readings.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy target a listing in Round Rock, a mini city in the Hill Country. They hit the ground running with money-saving ways to turn a tacky time capsule for taxidermy into a modern desert oasis.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 44
programme.desc: The emotions run high as the top five draw inspiration from their family food heroes, to win their last chance at immunity.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 2
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: Sean moved to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped. They are searching for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 25
programme.desc: Rachael is joined by husband John, as she shows how to prepare a chicken and fig dish, featured on their wedding menu. Meanwhile, Rachael's sister Maria makes a one-bowl carrot cake.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: When Theresa's mom uncovers a pile of Theresa's childhood memorabilia, it inspires Theresa to do the same in her attic, a room she's too scared to enter.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. programme.title: Africa Live

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Lifestyle Lab for The Prime Generation
programme.desc: This high-quality educational program, hosted by Tokiwa Takako, is designed for middle-aged and senior viewers with more free time, exploring ways to enjoy a fulfilling adult life through various topics, including food, health, and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today's Cooking
programme.desc: Cooking instructors will show all there is to know for a good hearty cooking.

programme.title: Tanka Poetry
programme.desc: The program introduces various Tanka created by viewers while learning and having fun with engaging guests.

programme.title: German in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Real-Life Travel English
programme.desc: This program is a practical listening course designed to help you understand fast-paced real English that you encounter when traveling abroad.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery (R)
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 47 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. programme.title: Girl Power - EP 708
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1764
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 50
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 509
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - EP 1977
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Have Fun Together - EP 94
programme.desc: A star-studded, cross-generational travel reality show that documents the unforgettable friendship journey of artists from different generations!

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 92
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: Kangsi Coming

"Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 10
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 12
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2820
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: Life in Hong Kong is vibrant and diverse. This lifestyle show combines diverse themes, exploring different areas in each episode and inviting elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: Shock Mystery (Sr.2)
programme.desc: This show documents strange happenings from all over the world, all of which cannot be explained from a point of view accepted by ordinary people. Explore incredible mysteries that not only existed in the past, but still exist today!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2822
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth - EP 14
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Treasure At Dawn - EP 18
programme.desc: A young doctor who is wrongly accused in a deadly case sets out to uncover the truth behind a mysterious "Heavenly Book". Along the way, he teams up with a clever noblewoman and a witty performer as they investigate a web of secrets in Liangzhou.

programme.title: Lose the Battle, Win the War
programme.desc: Through light-hearted conversations, this programme features celebrity guests as they unpack the ups and downs of marriage and share about the small moments that keep love alive.

programme.title: EXTRA
programme.desc: Keep up with the news on the entertainment circle in Hong Kong and all over the world, with reports on the latest drama series, movies, concert highlights, award ceremonies and more.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, keeping you informed about important events as well as updates in the world of sports.

programme.title: Global View
programme.desc: Curated by seasoned journalists, Global View guides you to look at the world with a global perspective - broadening your horizons, expanding your understanding of the news, and enriching your knowledge.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 28
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2224
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ko Sham goes about investigating the family charity foundation overseen by Sin-chuen. He finds out there are probably certain corrupt activities between the foundation and some children’s home. Sin-chuen uses resignation as a threat to force Yeung-tin to terminate the investigation.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2224
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 12
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] On the pretext of recovering gambling debts from Lam Yiu, Hok-lai and Yau-wai conspire to douse Lam Ching with red paint. Lam Ching is under pressure due to her family members’ sarcasm and accusations, so she writes a letter to Yeung-tin to explain her need to reconsider their marriage.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2226
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 14
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 898
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 4
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 20
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 12
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 15
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 7
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 8

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 1
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy._x000D__x000D_ MUI’s uncle asks him to take care of his nightclub, which delights him.
